name: Boot Staggered
name_jp: ブート・スタッガード
desc: When a Cyberse monster is Normal Summoned to your field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Boot Staggered" once per turn. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can Special Summon 1 "Stag Token" (Cyberse/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0).
mnst_eff: When a Cyberse monster is Normal Summoned to your field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Boot Staggered" once per turn. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can Special Summon 1 "Stag Token" (Cyberse/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0).
eff: When a Cyberse monster is Normal Summoned to your field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Boot Staggered" once per turn. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can Special Summon 1 "Stag Token" (Cyberse/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0).

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
